query: I finished my Q3 Sales report in Power BI Desktop, how do I get it onto app.powerbi.com so the regional managers can see it?
why: Publishing a finished report from Desktop to a service workspace is the skill's core trigger.

query: what's the difference between Member and Contributor in a workspace? trying to figure out which role to give our two junior analysts
why: Choosing/assigning workspace roles is explicitly in scope.

query: should i just share the Finance Dashboard directly with the 40 people in the dept or publish an app instead
why: Choosing between direct sharing and an app is a named distribution decision.

query: we have execs, ops, and field reps all opening the same workspace but they need to see different reports. can one app show different content to each group?
why: App audiences (show/hide content per group) is in scope even though 'audience' isn't named.

query: set up a weekly email so the CFO gets a PDF of the P&L report every Monday morning automatically
why: Email subscriptions / scheduled exports are explicitly covered.

query: how do i mark our Corporate Revenue semantic model as Certified so people stop building off random duplicates
why: Certifying/promoting (endorsement) content is a named trigger.

query: my team lives in Microsoft Teams, can I pin the Inventory KPI report as a tab in our channel?
why: Embedding reports in Teams is explicitly in scope.

query: the controllers want to pull the actuals dataset into Excel and have it refresh on its own, not a static paste
why: Analyze in Excel / refreshable Excel workbooks is a named integration trigger.

query: before I delete the old SalesFacts dataset I need to know which reports and dashboards downstream will break
why: Data lineage / impact analysis is an uncommon-but-valid named trigger.

query: I want a Viewer to be blocked from seeing other regions' numbers — is the Viewer role enough or do I need something more in the workspace?
why: Competes with securing-row-level-access but the Viewer-role distribution decision is this skill; it hands off to RLS.

query: I set up RLS roles in Manage Roles with a USERPRINCIPALNAME() dynamic filter but a couple users still see all the data, how do i debug the dax
why: Configuring/debugging RLS DAX roles belongs to securing-row-level-access.

query: deployment pipeline keeps failing when i promote the workspace from test to prod, the dataset binding doesn't update
why: Dev-to-prod pipeline promotion belongs to managing-deployment-lifecycle.

query: as tenant admin how do I turn off the 'export to Excel' setting org-wide in the admin portal?
why: Tenant-level admin portal settings belong to administering-and-governing.

query: this published report is super slow to open for viewers, the model is like 4GB — how do I shrink it?
why: Model size reduction and performance belongs to optimizing-model-performance.

query: scheduled refresh on the published dataset keeps failing with a gateway timeout against our on-prem SQL server
why: Refresh/gateway data source connectivity belongs to connecting-data-sources.

query: I need a pixel-perfect printable invoice that finance can export and mail to customers — multi-page with exact margins
why: Pixel-perfect printable RDL output belongs to building-paginated-reports, not service subscriptions.

query: embed our customer churn report inside our internal React web app using the powerbi-client js library and an app registration
why: Embedding into a custom app via REST/JS SDK belongs to embedding-and-automating.

query: add a slicer panel and bookmarks so viewers can toggle between actuals and budget on the same report page
why: Slicers/bookmarks/interactivity belong to building-interactive-reports.

query: how should I lay out the executive dashboard — what KPIs go top-left vs the detail visuals for a C-suite audience
why: Multi-visual dashboard layout for an audience belongs to dashboard-composition.

query: we're standing up a Center of Excellence and want an audit log of who's viewing which reports across all workspaces
why: Org-wide auditing/monitoring/COE governance belongs to administering-and-governing.

query: give the marketing security group edit rights to the campaign workspace but read-only on the shared Finance app
why: Assigning roles to a security group plus app access is squarely workspace roles + app sharing.

query: i made a live PowerPoint slide from a report tile but it won't refresh during the board meeting
why: Live PowerPoint integration of Power BI content is a named trigger.
